message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
class Account {
    +userdataall
    +admindataall
}

class User {
    +name
    +password
    +IDcard
    +getprice()
    +getdate()
    +getnumber()
    +getplace()
    +bookingtecket()
    +changebooking()
    +returnticket()
}

class Admin {
    +name
    +password
    +changeticket()
}

class TicketSystem {
    +cancel()
    +display()
    +recordticket()
    +recordorder()
    +displayticket()
    +displayorder()
    +update()
    +searchticket()
    +searchorder()
}

class Order {
    +username
    +userId
    +bookingtecket
}

class Ticket {
    +price
    +date
    +number
    +price
}

Account <|-- User
Account <|-- Admin
User --> TicketSystem
Admin --> TicketSystem
TicketSystem --> Order
TicketSystem --> Ticket

@enduml
```
